parameters.subject: Got your brief — I'll be in touch soon
parameters.text:
Hi {{ $json.name }},

Thanks for taking the time to fill that out — it genuinely helps.

I've received your brief for {{ $json.businessName }} and will review it within 1 business day. If anything's urgent, you can reach me directly at andre@hinterlandweb.com.

Talk soon,
André
Hinterland Web

parameters.subject: ={{ $json.subjectPrefix }}New website brief — {{ $json.businessName }}
parameters.html:
BUSINESS

Name: {{ $json.businessName }}

What they do: {{ $json.businessDescription }}

Current website: {{ $json.currentWebsite || 'None' }}

GOALS

Desired feelings: {{ $json.desiredFeelings }}

Turn-offs: {{ $json.turnOffs || 'None specified' }}
